caption: A man wearing a green baseball cap, black headphones, and a green t-shirt with the text "I CON NEVE DO SUIT" is speaking into a professional microphone in a room filled with framed photos and clothing racks. Behind him, a white mannequin torso stands near a rack of garments. In the background, several framed images of people are mounted on the wall. To the left and right of the man, logos are visible on screen: a circular logo with "R" on the left and "BOOSY" in red on the right. As the sequence progresses, the man gestures with his right hand while talking, first lifting it and then bringing it closer to his chest. His facial expressions shift as he speaks, transitioning from a slight smile to a more focused gaze. The background and equipment remain static throughout the clip.
